statement.p: Explain how we can use Corollary1.4.3 to say that every continuous function always has a derivative. (And we will demonstrate here that you can use a macro from docinfo: \definiteintegral{1}{2}{\frac{1}{x}}{x}=\ln(2)\text{.} It will work in the WeBWorK problem, regardless of whether you are using images, MathJax, or hardcopy.)
